---
title: "Welcome!"
subtitle: "Comparative Evolutionary Biologist in training"

about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/itasca_groupphoto.JPG
---

> I see biodiversity, and avian diversity in particular, as a means of helping nurture interest of curious minds towards nature and biodiversity, especially among communities where the broader social attitudes and beliefs hinder passion for the natural world.

Site under construction! ⚠️
